_comment: TQNN DMM Resolver Configuration — tqnn_resolvers.json v1.1.1
_docs: Maps filereference logical namespace prefixes to storage handlers for tqnn_get.

_prefix_rules.logical: Prefixes matching [a-zA-Z0-9]+_ are logical namespaces — resolved via this file.
_prefix_rules.non_logical: Anything else (https://, C:\, \\server\, /mnt/) is a non-logical reference — routed to the '*' catch-all webhook. Your middleware handles translation.
_prefix_rules.migration: When storage moves, update the config here. DMM filereferences never change.

resolvers._use_case: Local JSONL dataset — e.g. Lindisfarne M1 ingested line by line
Invoice documents stored in a local directory
Contracts in S3-compatible storage — middleware handles S3 auth and fetch
SharePoint / M365 documents — middleware uses MS Graph, DMM never sees credentials
Cold/archive storage — retrieval is async, returns ticket
In-memory namespace — written by tqnn_store during session, cleared on restart
resolvers._note: memory:// is non-logical but explicit — takes priority over * catch-all

resolvers._use_case: AWS Glacier or cold archive — async retrieval, returns ticket
resolvers._note: glacier:// is non-logical but explicit — takes priority over * catch-all

resolvers._use_case: Lindisfarne physical-address demo — byte-offset fetch via storage_target fetch service, no full-file read
Catch-all for non-logical refs: https://, C:\, \\server\, /mnt/ etc.
resolvers._behaviour: Full filereference passed as-is to middleware. Middleware handles URL rewriting, drive mapping, SMB resolution, bucket migration etc. DMM filereferences never change.

_env_vars.RESOLVER_ARCHIVE_WEBHOOK_URL: Webhook endpoint for archive_ cold storage
_env_vars.RESOLVER_WEBHOOK_SECRET: Shared secret sent in X-TQNN-Secret header to all webhooks
